example: My city is located in the south of Vietnam.

word: the cost of living is high / low
vietnamese: chi phí sinh hoạt cao / thấp
example: The cost of living in the city is quite expensive.

vietnamese: mọi người thân thiện và hay giúp đỡ
example: People in my hometown are very friendly and helpful.
The city environment is heavily polluted.
Living here is very convenient for students.

vietnamese: có nhiều cơ hội nghề nghiệp
example: City life has more career opportunities than the countryside.

word: enjoy the fresh and clean air
vietnamese: tận hưởng không khí trong lành
example: In the countryside, we can enjoy the fresh and clean air.
The city has many entertainments like cinemas and parks.

vietnamese: sống gần bệnh viện, trường học
example: City life is convenient — we live near hospitals and schools.
My hometown is very peaceful and quiet.
The city centre is very crowded on weekends.
Our living room is spacious but the bedroom is a bit cramped.

vietnamese: khu dân cư, khu vực xung quanh
example: We live in a safe and friendly neighbourhood.
My city has developed a lot in recent years.
